description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages build, test, lint, and deploy and sets the variable RUSTC_STABLE_VERSION to "1.35". Use the library/rust:$RUSTC_STABLE_VERSION Docker image for most jobs and rustlang/rust:nightly for the Rustc Nightly job. In the build stage add a Rustc Stable job and a Rustc Nightly job, both running the commands rustc --version and cargo check (the nightly job uses the rustlang/rust:nightly image). In the test stage add an Integration tests job that runs rustc --version and cargo test, uses the eventstore/eventstore:release-4.1.0 service aliased as eventstore, and defines EVENTSTORE_HOST=eventstore. In the lint stage add a Linting job that allows failure, runs rustup component add clippy-preview in before_script, then executes cargo clippy -- -D warnings. In the deploy stage add a push on crates.io job that runs only on tags and executes cargo --version, cargo login $CRATE_TOKEN, cargo package and cargo publish to publish the crate to crates.io.
